title: bunium alpinum var. eualpinum
intro: Bunium alpinum var. eualpinum, also known as Alpine Borrago, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Alpine Borrago plant, a type of flowering plant in the Boraginaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor infections. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. Alpine Borrago is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or salve, and can also be used as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
